steps.description: Define ReviewCardPayload schema with cloze/choices and protected metadata
Implement ClozeGenerator with Rule 3 fallback (downgrade to typing_practice)
Integrate frozen cloze/typing nodes into lesson_content.v1.json via build pipeline
Update ModularLessonAdapter with hard short-circuit bypass for cloze_practice
Implement UlvClozeRenderer with semantic 'Skip' (report failure, then advance)
Verify E2E generation and rendering with skip flow and hard-bypass tests
